text:
Riak CS is different from Riak 2 (a riakcs port could be made)

CS = cloud storage 

http://lmgtfy.com/?q=what+is+riak+cs

Riak CS is like similar to amazon S3 more about it: http://basho.com/riak-cloud-storage/

more about about riak1 vs riak2: http://basho.com/tag/riak-2-0/
